item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Muthoot Microfin Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 199.95
item.description: With a decisive intraday peak of Rs 199.95 on 30 Apr 2026, Muthoot Microfin Ltd has surged to a fresh 52-week high, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This advance comes amid a backdrop of strong technical signals that have aligned to propel the stock well above its key moving averages, underscoring robust upward momentum despite a broadly declining market. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Slip as Metal Sector Drags Market; Bajaj Auto and Gujarat Fluoroch Lead Gains
item.description: Indian equity benchmarks Sensex and Nifty closed lower on 30 Apr 2026, weighed down by broad-based sector declines and heavy losses in select large caps. The Nifty ended at 23,997.55, down 180.1 points or 0.74%, while the Sensex dropped 582.86 points, or 0.75%, to 76,913.50. Market breadth was weak with a significant number of declines across indices, reflecting cautious investor sentiment amid mixed global cues and upcoming corporate earnings. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Bhagyanagar India Ltd Reports Outstanding Q4 2026 Performance Amid Strong Financial Trend Upgrade
item.description: Bhagyanagar India Ltd has delivered an outstanding quarterly performance for the period ending March 2026, marking a significant upgrade in its financial trend from very positive to outstanding. The company’s latest results showcase record-breaking revenue, profit margins, and earnings per share, positioning it favourably within the non-ferrous metals sector despite a marginal dip in share price. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Pressure as BSE MIDCAP 150 Declines 1.01% Amid Sectoral Divergence
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE Midcap 150 index, experienced a notable decline of 1.01% on 30 April 2026, reflecting broad-based weakness across the sector. Market breadth was decidedly negative, with only 30 stocks advancing against 120 decliners, resulting in a subdued advance-decline ratio of 0.25x. Despite the overall downturn, select stocks such as Gujarat Fluorochemicals bucked the trend with a robust 7.01% gain, while others like Waaree Energies faced steep losses nearing 11%. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Pressure Amid Mixed Earnings and Sectoral Shifts
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE Smallcap 250 index, experienced a modest decline of 0.5% on 30 Apr 2026, reflecting a cautious market mood amid uneven sectoral trends and weak breadth. While select stocks delivered robust returns, the overall market breadth remained subdued, signalling investor hesitation in this high-volatility segment. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Broad Weakness Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, experienced a modest decline of 0.8% as April drew to a close, reflecting a cautious market mood. While heavyweight stocks showed varied technical shifts, the overall advance-decline ratio remained subdued, highlighting a market grappling with defensive and cyclical sector dynamics ahead of key earnings announcements. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Greenply Industries Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 30 Apr 2026
item.description: Greenply Industries Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 30 Apr 2026, with its stock price touching a low of Rs 263, marking a 7.48% drop from the previous close. This sharp fall reflects immediate price pressures amid broader market weakness and sectoral underperformance. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Ingersoll-Rand to 52-Week High of Rs 4450
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 4450 on 30 Apr 2026, Ingersoll-Rand (India) Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, propelled by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum that has carried the stock well above its key moving averages. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Adani Ports & Special Economic Zone Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1676.35
item.description: Surging to a fresh 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1,676.35 on 30 Apr 2026, Adani Ports & Special Economic Zone Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outperforming its sector and the broader market despite a subdued Sensex. This milestone caps a four-day winning streak that has delivered a 5.62% return, underscoring the stock’s robust technical positioning. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Meghna Infracon Infrastructure Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 771
item.description: With a sustained rally pushing Meghna Infracon Infrastructure Ltd to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 771 on 30 Apr 2026, the stock has demonstrated remarkable momentum, outpacing its sector and the broader market despite a subdued Sensex environment. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Sharda Cropchem Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 30 Apr 2026
item.description: Shares of Sharda Cropchem Ltd declined sharply today, touching an intraday low of Rs 1,068.9, reflecting a significant price correction of 7.08% amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 49 minutes ago

item.title: Hindalco Industries Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 30 Apr 2026
item.description: Hindalco Industries Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 30 Apr 2026, touching a low of ₹1,031.95, reflecting a 3.32% drop from the previous close. The stock’s downward movement came amid broader sector weakness and subdued market sentiment, with the non-ferrous metals sector and benchmark indices also under pressure. Time: 49 minutes ago

item.title: AVI Polymers Leads Micro Cap Rally with 254.8% Half-Year Return
item.description: AVI Polymers, a micro cap player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, has delivered an exceptional return of 254.81% over the past six months, outpacing its peers and the broader market by a significant margin. This remarkable performance underscores the stock’s strong fundamentals, bullish technical outlook, and attractive valuation, positioning it as a standout investment in a challenging market environment. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Market Rally with Exceptional 2614.7% Return in One Year
item.description: Covance Softsol, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has delivered an extraordinary return of 2614.69% over the past year, vastly outperforming its peers and benchmark indices. This remarkable surge highlights the stock’s strong fundamentals, technical momentum, and attractive valuation, positioning it as a standout performer in a challenging market environment. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Ports & Special Economic Zone Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 1,672 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Adani Ports & Special Economic Zone Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching its all-time high price of Rs 1,672.40 on 30 April 2026, marking a remarkable achievement in the transport infrastructure sector. This peak reflects the company’s sustained strong performance and robust market positioning over recent years. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Shares of HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 2,709.2, reflecting a 2.84% drop from the previous close. This downturn comes amid broader market weakness and specific pressures impacting the capital markets sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 612.95
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 612.95 on 30 Apr 2026, Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a 26.32% gain over the past year. This rally stands out amid a broadly subdued market backdrop, underscoring the stock’s robust technical momentum and sustained price strength. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts United Foodbrands Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 357.95
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 357.95 on 30 Apr 2026, United Foodbrands Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This rally comes amid a four-day consecutive gain, delivering a robust 17.37% return over this short span, outpacing its leisure services sector peers by 4.07% today alone. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Gujarat Alkalies & Chemicals Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 809
item.description: Surging to an intraday peak of Rs 809 on 30 Apr 2026, Gujarat Alkalies & Chemicals Ltd has marked a significant milestone by hitting a fresh 52-week high. This advance comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum, with the stock outperforming its sector by 7.52% today and extending gains over the past two sessions to 12.4%. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Welspun Specialty Solutions Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 44.9
item.description: With a sustained rally pushing it to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 44.9 on 30 Jun 2026, Welspun Specialty Solutions Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outpacing its sector and the broader market despite a subdued Sensex environment. Time: 1 hour ago
